title: Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026 Introduced in Lok Sabha
content:
# Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026 Introduced in Lok Sabha

Ek important update hai. Government ne Companies Act, 2013, aur Limited Liability Partnership (LLP) Act, 2008 ko amend karne ke liye Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026 Lok Sabha mein introduce kiya hai. Is Bill ko further scrutiny ke liye Joint Parliamentary Committee (JPC) ko refer kar diya gaya hai on March 23, 2026.

Yeh Bill 'Ease of Doing Business' ko badhane aur corporate governance ko strengthen karne ke liye kaafi significant changes propose karta hai.

*   **Decriminalisation of Offences:** Bill mein kaafi minor aur technical offences ko decriminalise kiya gaya hai, jiska matlab hai ki ab inpar criminal charges ke bajaye monetary penalties lagengi.
*   **Revised CSR Thresholds:** Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) ke liye net profit threshold ko ₹5 crore se badhakar ₹10 crore kar diya gaya hai. Iske saath hi, unspent CSR funds ko designated bank account mein transfer karne ki timeline bhi 30 din se badhakar 90 din kar di gayi hai.
*   **Virtual/Hybrid General Meetings:** Companies ab Annual General Meetings (AGMs) aur Extraordinary General Meetings (EGMs) ko virtual ya hybrid mode mein conduct kar sakengi.
*   **IFSC Entities ke liye Naya Framework:** International Financial Services Centres (IFSCs) mein operate karne wali LLPs ke liye ek structured framework introduce kiya gaya hai, jismein unhe foreign currency mein operate karne ki anumati bhi di gayi hai.
*   **Trust-to-LLP Conversion:** Specified trusts, khaaskar jo SEBI ya IFSCA ke under registered hain, ab directly LLPs mein convert ho sakengi.

Filhaal, yeh Bill Joint Parliamentary Committee ke paas detailed examination ke liye hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://prsindia.org/billtrack/the-corporate-laws-amendment-bill-2026-7788)

*Published on: 26 March 2026*
